item.title: [englishabuali] The Lebanese Ministry of Finance imposed personal sanctions on 9 individuals in Lebanon, including an ambassador, member
item.description:
Open
The Lebanese Ministry of Finance imposed personal sanctions on 9 individuals in Lebanon, including an ambassador, members of parliament, and Lebanese military and security personnel, due to their ties to Hezbollah.

Here is the list of names and positions:

1. Mohammad Fneish – Head of the Hezbollah Executive Council, former member of parliament.

2. Hassan Fadlallah – Hezbollah member of parliament since 2005.

3. Ibrahim al-Mousawi – Head of Hezbollah’s Communications Committee, member of parliament.

4. Hussein al-Hajj Hassan – Hezbollah member of parliament since 1996.

5. Mohammad Reza Sheibani – Iranian ambassador to Lebanon (declared persona non grata but refused to leave Lebanon).

6. Ahmad Baalbaki – Security director of the Shiite Amal Movement.

7. Ali Safaoui – Commander of the Shiite Amal Movement in southern Lebanon.

8. Khattar Nasser al-Din – Senior official in the Lebanese General Security Directorate.

9. Samer Hammadi – Colonel (equivalent to Aluf Mishne) in the Lebanese Army Intelligence Department in Dahieh.

##
The next step – adding them to Israel’s list of assassination targets...

2 comments

item.title: [englishabuali] The IDF eliminated two terrorists early this morning near the Israel-Lebanon border
item.description:
Open
The IDF eliminated two terrorists early this morning near the Israel-Lebanon border

The IDF Spokesperson reported at 05:15:

A short while ago, IDF surveillance identified suspicious movement by two armed men several hundred meters from the border with Israel in southern Lebanon.

Immediately after identification, and under continuous monitoring by the forces, the armed men were attacked and eliminated in an airstrike.
##
The IDF controls the "anti-tank line"—an area extending 8-10 km from the border. The detection of terrorists several hundred meters from the border raises quite a few questions.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] The Lebanese newspaper Al-Akhbar, affiliated with Hezbollah: The Lebanese military delegation for talks with Israel at t
item.description:
Open
The Lebanese newspaper Al-Akhbar, affiliated with Hezbollah: The Lebanese military delegation for talks with Israel at the end of the month will also include a Shiite officer from the Lebanese Army

According to Al-Akhbar, Brigadier General (equivalent to Brigadier) Wael Abbas, the Shiite, will take part in the delegation alongside three Christian officers, a Sunni officer (Colonel Omar Khalikhal), and a Druze officer (Colonel Mazen Al-Hajj) — all officers in the Lebanese Army.

##
The Lebanese government is trying to establish broad sectarian legitimacy for the negotiation delegation — under the military umbrella.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] Lebanese sources report that in the IDF strikes yesterday in Tebnine👆, among other things, the home of Yasser Mustafa Be
item.description:
Open
Lebanese sources report that in the IDF strikes yesterday in Tebnine👆, among other things, the home of Yasser Mustafa Berri, the brother of Nabih Berri—the Speaker of the Lebanese Parliament and head of the Shiite Amal Movement—was also attacked and destroyed.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] Turkey: Using the judicial system, Erdoğan eliminates another political rival – the second in 14 months
item.description:
Open
Turkey: Using the judicial system, Erdoğan eliminates another political rival – the second in 14 months

Yesterday, the Ankara court invalidated the 2023 decision of the main opposition party CHP’s congress to appoint Özgür Özel as party chairman, and forced it to reinstate Kılıçdaroğlu – a charisma-lacking candidate who has already lost to Erdoğan and is considered a “dead horse” who does not attract voters.

The reason for disqualifying Özel’s election – allegations of irregularities and vote buying within the opposition party.

About 14 months ago, Erdoğan, through the judicial system, brought down his very charismatic rival – İmamoğlu, who at the time served as mayor of Istanbul and, according to the polls, could have defeated Erdoğan at the ballot box due to his great popularity.

He and his associates remain in custody to this day on charges of corruption.

Erdoğan is eliminating his political rivals – all means are legitimate to ensure his party continues to rule.

Özel promised to appeal the decision of the Ankara Court of Appeals that disqualified him – the chances of the appeal succeeding appear to be low.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] The spokesperson for the National Security and Foreign Policy Committee in the Iranian parliament, Ebrahim Rezaei, respo
item.description:
Open
The spokesperson for the National Security and Foreign Policy Committee in the Iranian parliament, Ebrahim Rezaei, responds to the sanctions imposed yesterday by the US on Iran's ambassador to Lebanon 👆:

"Imposing sanctions on a diplomat from the Foreign Ministry means imposing sanctions on diplomacy itself. It is possible that the ongoing negotiations are also a deception, and the Americans are not interested in diplomacy. Now, after they have imposed sanctions on an Iranian diplomat, instead of diplomats, missiles should be sent to negotiate with the devil, so that he understands the matter."

one comment

item.title: [englishabuali] Lebanese media report 10 killed since this morning in IDF strikes in the village of Hanawiya and in the village of Deir
item.description:
Open
Lebanese media report 10 killed since this morning in IDF strikes in the village of Hanawiya and in the village of Deir Qanoun al-Nahr in southern Lebanon.

In the strike in Hanawiya early this morning, 4 Hezbollah paramedics were killed.
In the strike in Deir Qanoun al-Nahr, two paramedics from the Shiite Amal Movement were killed—one of whom also served as a journalist.

##
Make no mistake—all six are military operatives of Hezbollah and Amal in every respect. They exploit ambulances to advance terror operations, transfer Hezbollah operatives and weapons. They themselves participate in terror activities of a military nature.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] The newspaper Asharq Al-Awsat reports that the Palestinian representative at the UN General Assembly withdrew his candid
item.description:
Open
The newspaper Asharq Al-Awsat reports that the Palestinian representative at the UN General Assembly withdrew his candidacy for the position of Deputy Chair of the UN General Assembly after the Trump administration threatened to revoke the US entry visas of all members of the Palestinian delegation at the UN.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [arabworld301news] כוחות צוות הקרב של חטיבה 551 בפיקוד אוגדה 146 זיהו אתמול (ה'), חמישה מחבלי חיזבאללה שנכנסו למפקדה של ארגון הטרור, צפונית
item.description:
Open
כוחות צוות הקרב של חטיבה 551 בפיקוד אוגדה 146 זיהו אתמול (ה'), חמישה מחבלי חיזבאללה שנכנסו למפקדה של ארגון הטרור, צפונית לקו ההגנה הקדמי בדרום לבנון. בסגירת מעגל מהירה, הכווינו את חיל האוויר שתקף את המבנה וחיסל את המחבלים.

לאורך היממה האחרונה הותקפו מחסני אמצעי לחימה ותשתיות טרור ששימשו את ארגון הטרור חיזבאללה, וחוסלו מחבלים נוספים שהיוו איום על כוחותינו. 

צה"ל ימשיך לפעול להסרת איומים על כוחות צה"ל ואזרחי מדינת ישראל.

item.title: [englishabuali] In full cooperation with the Turks (and under their leadership), the flotilla deportees are putting on a show for the ca
item.description:
Open
In full cooperation with the Turks (and under their leadership), the flotilla deportees are putting on a show for the cameras (you can even see the look on their faces) and are being evacuated on stretchers at the airport in Istanbul.

2 comments

item.title: [englishabuali] A publication by the Saudi "Al Arabiya" network regarding a "framework for a draft agreement between the US and Iran" is
item.description:
Open
A publication by the Saudi "Al Arabiya" network regarding a "framework for a draft agreement between the US and Iran" is generating much interest in Israel – unjustifiably so!

First, let me state clearly here: the Saudi Al Arabiya network is not a particularly reliable source for reports of this kind.

Second, whenever there are negotiations, countless media spins are thrown into the air for various reasons, ranging from ratings to attempts to float trial balloons.

Third, Al Arabiya itself qualifies the publication right at the outset and writes:
"Well-informed sources reveal a framework for a potential agreement if the parties agree" – meaning the source is neither revealed nor known, and there is no agreement at all.

Fourth, even if you go over the framework's clauses, it doesn't say much beyond a ceasefire and the start of negotiations to resolve the disputed issues.

##

In other words, much ado about nothing.
If not for the exaggerated ratings it received in Israel, I wouldn't have addressed this report at all.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [arabworld301news] ועוד פרטים שעשויים להעיד על ממה שתכננו המחבלים לבצע:
item.description:
Open
ועוד פרטים שעשויים להעיד על ממה שתכננו המחבלים לבצע:
הם היו חמושים היטב - בנשקים ארוכים מסוג קלאצ׳ניקוב, ולבושים באפודים צבאיים, שככל הנראה הייתה בתוכם תחמושת נוספת כמו רימונים ומחסניות.

דורון קדוש
לפרסום ב-301: https://t.me/yossi301

301 העולם הערבי בטלגרם

item.title: [arabworld301news] “חמאס הפך את הניו יורק טיימס תעמולה שימושי עבורו.”
item.description:
Open
“חמאס הפך את הניו יורק טיימס תעמולה שימושי עבורו.”

בראיון חדש וחריף של המרכז הירושלמי לענייני חוץ וביטחון, נשיא JCFA ד״ר דן דייקר והנשיאה הנכנסת של NGO Monitor אולגה דויטש טוענים כי ארגונים בעלי קשרים לחמאס הצליחו להשפיע על הנרטיב שהתפרסם ב-New York Times סביב ההאשמות לפשעי מין.

״זה לא היה תחקיר עיתונאי, זו הייתה שיטת אקטיביזם פוליטי בתחפושת של עיתונות.״

🎙 לצפייה בראיון המלא

item.title: [arabworld301news] סנקציות המתנחלים של האיחוד האירופי: כך היטשטש הגבול בין טרור להתנגדות
item.description:
Open
סנקציות המתנחלים של האיחוד האירופי: כך היטשטש הגבול בין טרור להתנגדות

עו"ד תרצה שור מהמרכז הירושלמי לענייני חוץ וביטחון טוענת במאמר חדש כי האידיאולוגיה הפוסט-קולוניאלית, שעיצבה את החשיבה הפוליטית והאקדמית במערב מאז שנות ה-60, משפיעה כיום גם על האופן שבו אירופה מגדירה טרור, לגיטימציה ואלימות פוליטית. לפי המאמר, מוסדות אירופיים ובינלאומיים מאמצים מסגרת שמחלקת את העולם ל״מדכאים״ ו״מדוכאים״, תפיסה שלפיה אלימות מצד קבוצות מסוימות נתפסת כ״התנגדות״, בעוד ישראל ומתיישבים ביהודה ושומרון מסומנים כחלק מ״פרויקט קולוניאלי״.

שור קושרת בין הסנקציות האחרונות של האיחוד האירופי נגד ארגונים אזרחיים ישראליים לבין אותה תפיסת עולם אידיאולוגית, וטוענת כי היא משפיעה גם על יכולתה של אירופה להתמודד עם קיצוניות אסלאמית, אנטישמיות ומשברי הגירה בתוך גבולותיה. "אירופה מתקשה להבחין בין טרור לבין מאבק פוליטי משום שהקטגוריות המוסריות שלה הוחלפו במסגרת אידיאולוגית קשיחה. יבשת שאינה מסוגלת להבחין בין חקלאי יהודי באזור C לבין פעיל חמאס בעזה", היא כותבת, "עלולה לאבד גם את היכולת להבחין בין אזרח לג'יהאדיסט בתוך עריה שלה".

👈 המאמר המלא

item.title: [englishabuali] Saudi Arabia: Pilgrims in Mecca are fulfilling the Hajj commandment—one of the pillars of Islam.
item.description:
Open
Saudi Arabia: Pilgrims in Mecca are fulfilling the Hajj commandment—one of the pillars of Islam.

The ceremonies will continue until Eid al-Adha, which is expected to fall this coming Wednesday (in 5 days).

The pilgrims would be glad if the fighting with Iran does not resume during these days..

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] Ukraine: Remotely operated vehicle rescues wounded soldier from the line of fire
item.description:
Open
Ukraine: Remotely operated vehicle rescues wounded soldier from the line of fire

A Ukrainian robotic evacuation vehicle, equipped with an armored capsule, managed to rescue a wounded soldier from a frontline outpost.
During the evacuation, on the way back, the vehicle hit two mines. Despite the explosions, the armored capsule protected the wounded soldier from shrapnel, and the mission was completed successfully.

The soldier was evacuated for further medical treatment.

Details about the mission:
• Duration: 2 hours and 13 minutes
• Distance traveled by the vehicle: 36.5 km
• Average speed: 15 km/h
• Maximum speed: 70 km/h

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [arabworld301news] דובר צה"ל
item.description:
Open
דובר צה"ל
בהמשך להתרעות שהופעלו לפני זמן קצר במספר מרחבים בצפון הארץ, זוהו מספר נפילות של מטרות אוויריות חשודות במרחב הגבול עם לבנון. הפרטים בבדיקה.

item.description:

item.title: [englishabuali] The elimination of 5 Hezbollah operatives with the "loaded backpacks" 👆 took place, according to OSINT sources, in the a
item.description:
Open
The elimination of 5 Hezbollah operatives with the "loaded backpacks" 👆 took place, according to OSINT sources, in the area of the village of Al-Mansouri, in its southwestern part.

This area is located about 3 km from the outpost established by the IDF in Al-Bayyada – Hezbollah’s number 1 target for explosive drone attacks.

Let’s hope the impact of the strike will be felt in this area.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] Flotilla activist spreads rape libels against IDF soldiers
item.description:
Open
Flotilla activist spreads rape libels against IDF soldiers

Tiago Abelha, the Brazilian activist whom Israel released from detention only about two weeks ago after he was apprehended by Navy fighters on the flotilla to Gaza, is now spreading blood libels against IDF soldiers and accusing them of the systematic rape of flotilla participants who have just been released.

He is also using the claim that Israel trains dogs to rape Palestinians, and notes that everything done to the flotilla activists will eventually result in legal cases in The Hague.

##
He should have stayed in prison in Israel for quite a few years, the writing was on the wall☝️

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] A photo by the Israeli photographer Chen Kalifa Levi that is being widely shared among Gazan users:
item.description:
Open
A photo by the Israeli photographer Chen Kalifa Levi that is being widely shared among Gazan users:

Nahal Oz is blooming and thriving in the foreground of the photo, facing the ruins of the devastated Shuja'iyya neighborhood in the east of Gaza City - in the background. 

A victory photo.

To comment, follow this link

The IDF spokesperson reported during the day about several impacts as a result of Hezbollah launches.

item.title: [englishabuali] The ISNA news agency adds, citing its sources, that the presence of the commander of the Pakistani army in Tehran does n
item.description:
Open
The ISNA news agency adds, citing its sources, that the presence of the commander of the Pakistani army in Tehran does not necessarily mean that an understanding will be reached regarding the framework of an initial agreement.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] Good news for Israel – a turnaround in Slovenia:
item.description:
Open
Good news for Israel – a turnaround in Slovenia:

The Slovenian parliament has elected the right-wing politician Janez Janša as Prime Minister – 50 out of 90 members of parliament supported him (a minimum of 46 is required).
Janša is one of Israel’s most prominent supporters in Europe, who opposed the previous Slovenian government’s (left-liberal government) recognition of a Palestinian state and called the move “support for terror.”

In the past, he promised to move Slovenia’s embassy to Jerusalem.

Slovenia has instantly gone from being the most hostile country to Israel in the European Union to the most supportive – and this is significant within the EU.
Slovenia is a full member of the Union, and now there is another automatic vote in favor of Israel (in addition to the Czech Republic).

##
I should note that his government does not have a stable majority in parliament, and it would be enough for one party in his coalition to leave for him to lose power.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [arabworld301news] דובר משרד החוץ האיראני, אסמאעיל בקאי:
item.description:
Open
דובר משרד החוץ האיראני, אסמאעיל בקאי:

- הביקור הפקיסטני בטהראן הוא המשך למסלול הדיפלומטי הנוכחי, אך אי אפשר לומר שההסכם קרוב.

- סיום המלחמה בכל החזיתות כולל לבנון, הוא נושא בעל חשיבות רבה.

- המחלוקות העמוקות בין איראן לארצות הברית מונעות הגעה לתוצאה סופית במשא ומתנים הדיפלומטיים הנוכחיים.

לפרסום ב-301: https://t.me/yossi301

יוסי אליעזר
301 העולם הערבי בטלגרם

item.title: [englishabuali] Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson, Esmaeil Baqaei (who was appointed today as spokesperson for the Iranian negotiati
item.description:
Open
Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson, Esmaeil Baqaei (who was appointed today as spokesperson for the Iranian negotiation delegation):

It cannot necessarily be said that we have reached a stage where an agreement is within reach.

At this stage, there are no plans to discuss the nuclear issue.

The disagreements between Iran and the United States are so deep that it cannot be said that we will necessarily reach a result through just a few diplomatic rounds.

At this stage, we will not reach a result if we want to discuss the issue of enriched uranium.

First, it is necessary to reach an end to the war under conditions that will guarantee our interests and alleviate our concerns, and only then will we talk—or not talk—about the other issues.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [arabworld301news] הנשיא טראמפ בתגובה לשאלה אם ישתתף בחתונה של בנו, בשבת באיי בהאמה: ''אני אנסה להגיע אבל זה לא זמן טוב, יש את איראן ועניינ

item.title: [englishabuali] A collection of responses from Gazan users to the photo by photographer Chen Khalifa Levi 👆:
item.description:
Open
A collection of responses from Gazan users to the photo by photographer Chen Khalifa Levi 👆:

1. الجنة والنار
Heaven and hell

2. الانتصار في ابهى صورة
Victory in all its glory.

3. كأنه البحر مبين من جوا من عند يهوd
You can see the sea from the Jewish side.

4. مبين عليهم الهزيمة 🤔 ومبين علينا النصر 🧐
You can see defeat on them 🤔 and victory on us 🧐

5. ابو ابراهيم هل تسمعني الهزيمة باينة عليهم
Abu Ibrahim (Yahya Sinwar – AA), do you hear me? You can see that they were defeated.

6. البحر مبين من أقصى الشرق... صادق بن غفير لما قال بدنا نعمل اطلالة بحرية لسكان المستوطنات
You can see the sea from the far east... Ben Gvir was right when he said they would make a sea view for the settlers.

7. هي صار اللي بدك اياه ، بتشوف البحر من ناحال عوز 🙂
Here, you got what you wanted – now you can see the sea from Nahal Oz 🙂

8. المهم احنا انتصرنا 🙃
The main thing is that we won 🙃

9. هادي بئيري اللي كنا نرمي عليها كوندوم ؟
Is this Be’eri, where we used to throw condoms (incendiary balloons – AA)?

10. هاد بركات الطوفان
These are the blessings of “the Flood” – the Tufan (Tufan al-Aqsa – the name of Hamas’s operation on 7.10)

11. شوف الفرق بين بيوتهم وبيوتنا زي الجنة وجهنم حسبنا الله ونعم الوكيل
Look at the difference between their houses and ours – like heaven and hell. May Allah avenge them.

12. لاسف بغباءنا عندهم العمار وعندنا الخراب ياريت تكون هذة الصوره للمقارنة ونعرف ما جلبناه بايدنا مبسوطين هيك
Unfortunately, because of our stupidity, they have prosperity and we have destruction. I wish this photo would be used for comparison so we understand what we brought upon ourselves with our own hands. Are you happy like this?

13. الصورة جد يعني؟
Is the photo real?

14. القهر في صورة الحمد لله على الانتصار
Pain and humiliation in one picture – thank God for the victory.

15. ناحل عوز جنة وغزة خرابة بما كسبت ايدينا
Nahal Oz is heaven, and Gaza is ruined because of what we did with our own hands.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] Gaza Strip: IDF fighter jets struck two residential complexes this evening—one in the Al-Bureij refugee camp and the oth
item.description:
Open
Gaza Strip: IDF fighter jets struck two residential complexes this evening—one in the Al-Bureij refugee camp and the other in the Nuseirat refugee camp—both in the center of the Strip.

Evacuation warnings preceded the strikes.

##
Earlier today, Gazans reported that IDF forces and members of militias opposed to Hamas evacuated residents in eastern Deir al-Balah, in the center of the Strip, and then demolished several residential houses there using bulldozers.

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [arabworld301news] ניו יורק פוסט מפרסם כי מתחקיר חקירתו של פעיל חיזבאללה העיראקי מוחמד בקר סעד דאוד אל סעדי שנעצר בגין תכנון פיגועים וסיוע
item.description:
Open
ניו יורק פוסט מפרסם כי מתחקיר חקירתו של פעיל חיזבאללה העיראקי מוחמד בקר סעד דאוד אל סעדי שנעצר בגין תכנון פיגועים וסיוע לטרור, המחבל אל סעדי תכנן להתנקש בבת איוונקה טראמפ , אשר עפ"י התוכנית שקיבל, הייתה מטרה לתכנון התנקשות כנקמה על הריגת המנהיג העליון של איראן על ידי הנשיא.

מוחמד בקר סעד דאוד אל-סעדי, פעיל במשמרות המהפכה האיראניים, שנעצר לאחרונה, נשבע להרוג את איוונקה והיה ברשותו תוכנית לביתה בפלורידה.

גילי ר.בטחון
301 העולם הערבי בטלגרם
https://t.me/arabworld301news
